title: Reading Training
description: Train the muscle to grow your world through books!

scenes.speech: Welcome to the Reading Dojo! Books are the cheapest travel! 📚
scenes.title: Reading Dojo
scenes.content: Reading training values 'what you carry away in your own words' more than the number of books. One insight from one book can change a life.

scenes.title: How to Pick a Book
scenes.content: It doesn't need to be a bestseller. The cover, title, or first page that makes you want to read it is the right book for you now.
scenes.highlight:
Pick by:
- Cover instinct
- First page
- Today's mood

scenes.title: 10 Pages a Day
scenes.content: 10 pages a day finishes a 300-page book in a month. Perfectionism kills reading. Steady drips become a flood.

scenes.speech: Underline one line that moved you!
scenes.title: One-Line Highlight
scenes.content: You don't need to remember everything. Keep just one line per book — the one you 'never want to forget.'
scenes.highlight:
Highlight rule:
- Moved you
- Want to reread
- 1–3 per book

scenes.title: 3-Line Note
scenes.content: Line 1: a scene that stayed. Line 2: why. Line 3: how you'll use it. Even three lines anchor the book deeply.
scenes.highlight:
3-line shape:
1. Scene
2. Why
3. How to use

scenes.title: Talk to Anchor
scenes.content: Telling reveals whether you really understood. Pitch the book to a family member or friend in one minute.
scenes.highlight:
How to share:
- 1 minute
- The line
- Why recommend

scenes.title: Range
scenes.content: Beyond favorites, try one out-of-zone genre every six months. Your view of the world becomes 3D.
scenes.highlight:
Stretch:
- Fiction / Non-fiction
- Science / History
- Picture books for adults too

scenes.speech: Tell one family member about a book today 🌟
scenes.title: Training Complete!
scenes.content: The true value of reading isn't at the last page; it's how the book bends your daily choices. Tomorrow's you begins from today's page.
